steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is the emphasis on extreme differences, “even by James's standards” — this underscores the magnitude of revision in this particular novel.

steps.title: Match the transition to the logic
steps.content: ”In fact” presents the critics' view as reinforcement of that magnitude — because the differences are so significant, critics reasonably regard the editions as different novels. The other options create false relationships: “by contrast” and “nevertheless” falsely signal opposition, while “in other words” falsely suggests these are equivalent restatements. That matches choice B — B is correct.
